title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: Apify MCP Connectors is a tool designed to significantly enhance the capabilities of Hermes Agent. The creator claims it makes the agent approximately 10 times more powerful when integrated together.
writeup: The video demonstrates Apify MCP Connectors, integrations built on the Model Context Protocol that extend an agent's capabilities, applied to Hermes Agent. It walks through connecting these integrations to Hermes Agent and shows the resulting performance gains, with the channel claiming a 10x improvement. The takeaway: MCP-based connectors serve as a vertical integration layer that broadens what the agent can do.
